sections.description: Check your WordPress site against the WP Registry — a public database of hashed plugins, themes, and files. Hash-based vulnerability and malware detection, plus one-command submission of unaudited builds for review.
sections.changelog:
1.1.0

  • New wp registry upload — upload unaudited, latest-version builds to the audit queue (whole site or a single type/slug).
  • check now reports update (a newer version is available) and in queue (uploaded, awaiting audit).
  • check looks up only your hashes via prefix-sharded, edge-cached lookups instead of downloading the full manifests — faster and always fresh.

1.0.0

  • Initial release: check, show, and update.
